name: searxng-http-mcp
description: Privacy-first metasearch MCP server powered by SearXNG. Aggregates 200+ search engines with API key auth, reverse proxy, and multi-page fanout. Supports HTTP and stdio transports.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the web using SearXNG metasearch engine. Aggregates results from 200+ engines with multi-page fanout, filtering by category/engine/language/time range.

tools.name: autocomplete
tools.description: Get search query suggestions from SearXNG for a given partial query.

tools.name: engine_info
tools.description: Get available search engines and categories from the SearXNG instance, grouped by category.
